steps.title: Identify the shared trait the question asks about
steps.content: The task is to emphasize a similarity between glaciers and icebergs in Greenland. The notes show both melt into surrounding water and both contribute to rising sea levels — that shared outcome is the similarity to highlight.

steps.title: Eliminate choices that miss the similarity and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• "Because icebergs break off Greenland's glaciers into the water, their melting rate depends on water temperature.": This focuses only on icebergs and their melting rate; it does not show what glaciers and icebergs share. ✗
  • "Greenland's glaciers and icebergs both melt during the year, contributing to rising sea levels.": Names both glaciers and icebergs and states their shared effect — both melt and both contribute to rising sea levels. ✓
  • "Geoscientist Maya Chen found that the melting rate of Greenland's icebergs, unlike that of glaciers, does not depend on air temperature.": Explicitly contrasts glaciers and icebergs (“unlike”), highlighting a difference rather than a similarity. ✗
  • "Glaciers on the coast of Greenland melt during the warm summer months into the surrounding water, the temperature of which remains consistent throughout the year.": Describes only glaciers and their seasonal melting; icebergs are not mentioned, so no similarity is drawn. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
